sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 몬스터 베버리지, 2025년 2분기 매출 21억 1,000만 달러로 사상 첫 20억 달러 돌파

keyPoints.text: 2025년 2분기 매출이 전년 동기 대비 11.1% 증가한 21억 1,000만 달러를 기록하며 사상 처음으로 20억 달러를 넘어섰습니다.
비GAAP 조정 기준 주당 순이익은 0.52달러를 기록했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 주력인 몬스터 에너지 음료 부문 매출이 11.2% 증가한 19억 4,000만 달러를 기록했습니다.
전략 브랜드 부문 매출은 18.9% 증가한 1억 2,990만 달러를 기록했으나, 알코올 브랜드 부문 매출은 8.6% 감소한 3,800만 달러를 기록했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 2분기 전체 매출은 21억 1,000만 달러로 전년 동기 19억 달러 대비 11.1% 성장했습니다.
환율 변동의 부정적 영향은 전체 매출에서 500만 달러, 몬스터 에너지 부문에서 480만 달러로 나타났습니다.

watchItems.text: 알코올 브랜드 부문의 매출 감소세가 지속될지, 향후 회복 전략이 있는지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 tm2522843d1_ex99-1.htm EXHIBIT 99.1 Exhibit 99.1 PondelWilkinson Inc. 2945 Townsgate Road, Suite 200 Westlake Village, CA 91361 T (310) 279 5980 Investor Relations W www.pondel.com Strategic Public Relations CONTACTS: Mark Astrachan SVP, Investor Relations & Corporate Development (951) 739-6200 Roger S. Pondel / Judy Lin NEWS PondelWilkinson Inc. RELEASE (310) 279-5980 MONSTER BEVERAGE REPORTS 2025 SECOND QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS 2025 Second Quarter Highlights · Record Quarterly Net Sales exceed the $2.0 billion threshold for the first time in the Company’s history · Net Sales rise 11.1 percent to $2.11 billion; 11.4 percent to $2.12 billio  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.0 billion = 20억 달러; $2.11 billion = 21억 1,000만 달러; $2.12 billion = 21억 2,000만 달러; $631.6 million = 6억 3,160만 달러; $2.0 = 2.0달러; $2.11 = 2.11달러; $2.12 = 2.12달러; $631.6 = 631.6달러; 11.1 percent = 11.1%; 23.0 percent = 23.0%; 11.4 percent = 11.4%; 19.8 percent = 19.8%; 21.5 percent = 21.5%; 21.1 percent = 21.1%.

o $0.52 per share on a non-GAAP adjusted basis The tables at the end of this press release provide a reconciliation of non-GAAP financial measures to the Company’s results, as reported under GAAP. (See “Reconciliation of GAAP and Non-GAAP Information” below). Corona, CA – August 7, 2025 – Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ: MNST) today reported financial results for the three- and six-months ended June 30, 2025. Net sales for the 2025 second quarter increased 11.1 percent to $2.11 billion, from $1.90 billion in the same period last year. Net changes in foreign currency exchange rates had an unfavorable impact on net sales for the 2025 second quarter of $5.0 million. Net sales on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP) increased 11.4 percent in the 2025 second quarter.   Normalized numeric aliases: $2.11 billion = 21억 1,000만 달러; $1.90 billion = 19억 달러; $5.0 million = 500만 달러; $0.52 = 0.52달러; $2.11 = 2.11달러; $1.90 = 1.90달러; $5.0 = 5.0달러; 11.1 percent = 11.1%; 11.4 percent = 11.4%.

ercent in the 2025 second quarter. Net sales for the Company’s Monster Energy® Drinks segment, which primarily includes the Company’s Monster Energy® drinks, Reign Total Body Fuel® high performance energy drinks, Reign Storm® total wellness energy drinks and Bang Energy® drinks, increased 11.2 percent to $1.94 billion for the 2025 second quarter, from $1.74 billion for the 2024 second quarter. Net changes in foreign currency exchange rates had an unfavorable impact on net sales for the Monster Energy® Drinks segment of approximately $4.8 million for the 2025 second quarter. Net sales on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP) for the Monster Energy® Drinks segment increased 11.4 percent in the 2025 second quarter. (more) Monster Beverage Corporation 2-2-2 Net sales for the Compan  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.94 billion = 19억 4,000만 달러; $1.74 billion = 17억 4,000만 달러; $4.8 million = 480만 달러; $1.94 = 1.94달러; $1.74 = 1.74달러; $4.8 = 4.8달러; 11.2 percent = 11.2%; 11.4 percent = 11.4%.

Coca-Cola Company, as well as the Company’s affordable energy brands Predator® and Fury®, increased 18.9 percent to $129.9 million for the 2025 second quarter, from $109.2 million in the 2024 second quarter. Net changes in foreign currency exchange rates had an unfavorable impact on net sales for the Strategic Brands segment of approximately $0.2 million for the 2025 second quarter. Net sales on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP) for the Strategic Brands segment increased 19.1 percent in the 2025 second quarter. Net sales for the Alcohol Brands segment, which is comprised of various craft beers, flavored malt beverages and hard seltzers, decreased 8.6 percent to $38.0 m  Normalized numeric aliases: $129.9 million = 1억 2,990만 달러; $109.2 million = 1억 920만 달러; $0.2 million = 20만 달러; $38.0 million = 3,800만 달러; $41.6 million = 4,160만 달러; $129.9 = 129.9달러; $109.2 = 109.2달러; $0.2 = 0.2달러; $41.6 = 41.6달러; $38.0 = 38.0달러; 18.9 percent = 18.9%; 19.1 percent = 19.1%; 8.6 percent = 8.6%.
